title: Deployment Health
subtitle: Configuration readiness checks for hosted and self-hosted reliability; this is not a live canary or uptime monitor.
accessPasswordRequiredLocalProduction: Production local mode is blocked until ACCESS_PASSWORD is configured or an explicit insecure override is enabled.
accessPasswordInsecureOverride: Production local mode is open through ALLOW_INSECURE_LOCAL_PRODUCTION; use this only behind another private access boundary.
accessPasswordOptionalLocal: A deployment password is optional during local development.
proxyHeadersTrusted: Forwarded client identity is accepted from a trusted proxy.
proxyHeadersFallback: Forwarded headers are ignored. Protected APIs use request-proof identity and access verification uses a signed attempts cookie.
proxyHeadersLocal: Local mode does not require trusted proxy headers.
byokStable: A stable server key is configured.
byokEphemeral: Ephemeral keys are allowed; configure a stable key before production.
byokMissing: No stable BYOK key is configured.
apiProofEnabled: High-cost API routes require short-lived request proof.
apiProofMissing: Hosted request proof needs a stable BYOK server key.
apiProofLocal: Request proof is disabled in local mode.
storesShared: Rate limit, document job, and plugin registry stores use shared storage.
storesMemory: One or more memory stores are in use; this is only suitable for local or single-instance deployments.
storesMissingHosted: Hosted mode needs shared rate limit, document job, and plugin registry stores.
defaultModelReady: A usable model source is available.
defaultModelMissing: No server or local model source is configured.
searchReady: Grok web search is enabled by the administrator.
searchMissing: Grok web search is not configured or enabled.
ragReady: Knowledge retrieval or document parsing is available.
ragMissing: RAG and document parsing are not configured.
voiceReady: Speech services are available through server defaults or local settings.
pluginsReady: At least one plugin is installed locally.
pluginsRegistryMissingHosted: Hosted custom plugins need a shared server registry.
